facts: Hilo is a memory agent for the Qwen Cloud hackathon, Track 1 MemoryAgent.
Stack: Python plus Qwen on Alibaba Cloud Model Studio via the DashScope international endpoint.
Decision: MIT license, single-file agent plus a memory engine, nothing else.
Open question: which Qwen model gives the fastest demo latency?
